title: Roundtable Task Card Template
description: Validates task card templates used to compose the inner affordance card for an active background sub-task. Required fields: sub_task_id, skills, preferred_tools, expected_output_shape, completion_marker. Optional max_skills_override. Max ~30 lines. Traces: FR-001, AC-001-02, FR-004, AC-004-01.

sub_task_id.description: Unique identifier for this sub-task (e.g., scope-framing, codebase-scan, blast-radius, options-research, dependency-check, tracing)

source.description: Skill source: shipped (framework), project (.claude/skills/), or user (~/.claude/skills/)

delivery_type.description: How the skill is injected: context (full content), instruction (key rules), reference (pointer only)

skills.description: Skills applicable to this sub-task, queried from manifest and filtered by budget

expected_output_shape.description: Schema or description of the expected output structure from this sub-task

completion_marker.description: Signal phrase or pattern that indicates this sub-task is complete (parsed by marker extractors)

max_skills_override.description: Optional override of max_skills_total budget for this sub-task. When set, takes precedence over the global config value.

max_total_lines.description: Hint for maximum total lines in the composed task card output (default ~30 per module-design.md)
